'''''Wiggins''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] in service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was scheduled to rendezvous with the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Warrior (Star Destroyer)|''Warrior'']] bearing a cargo of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. As this class of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] had never been designed to carry life forms, conditions on board were brutal and overcrowded. On the way to its rendezvous, the ship was disabled by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] so that ''[[Citadel 2]]'', another BFF-1 bulk freighter, could dock with it and liberate the slaves. While this action was being executed, Rebel pilot [[Halley Kadorto]] held off wave after wave of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. The freighter was presumably destroyed shortly afterwards.
